channel.title: Favorite video game quotes?
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Favorite video game quotes?"

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"The darkest pit of hell has opened to swallow you whole; don't keep the Devil waiting, friend."
-FNaF of all places

The world calls for the skills of us horrid men. And we answer. No greater good. No just cause. Just a paycheck, and another dead man.
-MGS V

Joshua Graham: "For many of us, the road is a difficult one, but the path is always there for us to follow, no matter how many times we may fall."
Courier: "Do you ever 'fall?'"
"Every day. Some days are… harder than others."
-Fallout: New Vegas

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: the lore 🌚

item.title: Admin Post - Info - Open
item.content:encoded: reasercher murphy, instead of posting multiple comments in succession, please edit your previous post using the "edit" function under the "options" tab to the lower right of every comment. That prevents spam buildup, and it's in the rules.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
my second video game quote…

Yeah… I know, I gotta believe! - parappa
Parappa the rapper

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
RAHHHHH - cannibal

The forest

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"A gull perched on a spent bonnet, sideways, whilst the sirens fell through the middle distance and the metal moaned in grief about us. I am about this night in walking, old bread and gull bones, old Donnelly at the bar gripping his drink, old Esther walking with our children, old Paul, as ever, old Paul he shakes and he shivers and he turns off his lights alone."
- Dear Esther

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "I sure wish the Burger Tank was open. I could go for a BBQ bacon burger. And a large order of fries, and… An orange soda with no ice, and a… piece of hot apple pie." -Coach, L4D2

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "KA-BOOM" -Demoman, TF2

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: “All toasters toast toast” - The plumber guy

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: I have to say the first time i played the now commonly known game Minecraft but before that it would prob be spelunky classic a year before

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"Welcome to the Velvet Room."

-Persona 1-5.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"It's-a-me, Mario!"

-Mario

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"I guess you couldn’t survive… Five Nights at Freddy's"

- Five Nights at Freddy's

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"The right man in the wrong place can make all the difference in the world."
- Half-life 2

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"All right, partner, this is a Cayde riff in 6, watch me for the changes, and uh…try to keep up. Now let’s go to prison!”

-Cayde-6

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
“Human existence without beer is one big fuck fest! Oh wait, beer hasn’t been invented yet.”
-swine, ravens guidance

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"shipmaster! They outnumber us three to one!"
-Rando Shadow Of Intent Bridge Crew, Halo 3
"Then it is an even fight"
-The Shipmaster, in response.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"See how things have changed my friend. Now it is their land…their people…their blood."
— Reznov

“Death is a preferable alternative to Communism!”— Liberty Prime

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: I nearly cried from this.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
In time, you will learn the tragic extent of my failings…
– The Ancestor, Darkest Dungeon

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "History is determined by the victor…" - General Shepard, MW2.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: I don't know about angels, but it's fear that gives men wings- Max Payne.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
“How’s your sister” - Cayde-6

“Trust me” - BT-7274

“Fookin laser sights” - Thatcher

“Red sus” - some dude in Among us

“I fear no man, but that thing, it’s scares me” - Heavy

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "Do you like hurting other people?" Richard Hotline Miami

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"Don't expect another sequel. Live in the moment. This is one of the most important lessons in life.”
- King of Cosmos, Katamari Damacy

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"On a scale of 1 to 10, she's an 11, and she'd give herself a 12." - The Voice
From Furi. So much characterization in one quote

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
Honestly just nearly all of Portal/Portal 2. It's so full of amazing memorable lines. But we all know which one is above else:
"Make the life TAKE THE LEMONS BACK! Get mad! I don't want your damn lemons! What the hell am I supposed to do with these??"
Cave Johnson, you're the best.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"I am the great mighty poo."

-Conker's Fur Bad Fur Day

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
YOU HAVE ACCOMPLISHED THE MISSION

YOU ARE THE VERY PREVAILER THAT PROTECTS RIGHT AND JUSTICE

I WOULD EXPRESS MY SINCERE. THANKS TO YOU

TAKE GOOD REST!
- GENERAL KAWASAKI

Ikari Warriors, NES.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "A slave Obeys. A man chooses." -Andrew Ryan in Bioshock 1

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
I like shorts! They're comfy and easy to wear! -Random Youngster in Pokemon Red+Blue

I live by this ^^^

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"From the moment I understood the weakness of my flesh, it disgusted me.
I craved the strength and certainty of steel. I aspired to the purity of the blessed machine.
Your kind cling to your flesh as if it will not decay and fail you.
One day the crude biomass that you called a temple will wither, and you'll beg my kind to save you.
But I am already saved. For the machine is immortal.
Even in death I serve the Omnissiah."

-Magos Dominus Reditus, Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus

The voice acting of Warhammer games is pretty much stellar all around, but that little speech at the beginning of Mechanicus is on another level imo. The whole sound design of that game is amazing, tbh.

However, my favorite quotes at this moment are from Disco Elysium, but they are a pretty spoilery, so I'll refrain from posting them.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "The truth is, the game was rigged from the start" Benny, FNV

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"My country lay within a vast desert. When the sun rose into the sky, a burning wind punished my lands, searing the world. And when the moon climbed into the dark of night, a frigid gale pierced our homes. No matter when it came, the wind carried the same thing… Death. But the winds that blew across the green fields of Hyrule brought something other than suffering and ruin. I coveted that wind, I suppose."

- Ganondorf, The Windwaker

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"I don't give a runny green shit what you think."

- Geralt of Rivia, The Witcher 3

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
“You said it yourself Kain, there are only two sides to your coin.”
“‘APPARENTLY so. But suppose you flip a coin enough times, suppose one day… it lands on it’s edge.”
-Kain to Raziel in Legacy of Kain: Soul Reaver 2.

I never got to play it but I’ve seen the whole series cutscenes over and over again. A few hours worth for each game.

“You don’t need a reason to help someone.”
-Zidane, Final Fantasy 9. First final fantasy I ever played.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"Who am I? Let's just say I'm God; your God…least, the only God that's listening right now. What do I want? Ah, same as any other God; a little faith…for without faith I am nothing…and without me you're fucked."

Splatterhouse (2010)

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
Some of my favorites include:

"What did the green grape say to the purple grape? Breathe, you idiot!" - Ellie ~ The Last of Us

"Get out of here, stalker!" - Random stalker ~ S.T.A.L.K.E.R. series

"Men must be free to do what they believe. It is not our right to punish them for thinking what they do, no matter how much we disagree." - Altaïr Ibn-La’Ahad ~ Assassin's Creed

"Just like the simulations!” - Unknown 501st Clone Trooper ~ Battlefront 2

"Do you feel like a hero yet?" - John Konrad ~ Spec Ops: The Line

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
My Favorites:

… … Red in Pokemon Gold, Silver, Crystal, HeartGold, and Soulsilver

Nothing was inside the Mailbox. Nothing after nothing came pouring out. Tanetane Mailbox in Mother 3

Groucho said 'Hello' and left. Battle Text from MOTHER

PK THUNDER!!! Lucas in Smash Bros. Ultimate

It is dark. You are likely to be eaten by a grue. Zork

My least favorite:

…Would you like to hear that again? Yes? Ok… Long Tutorials after you accidentally hit the [EXPLETIVE] "A" button for the 5th [EXPLETIVE] time

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "I kid you not, he turns himself into a pickle. He's called Pickle Rick. Funniest shit I've ever seen." -—Master Chief

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: Yes, I have played video games.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: you played video games?

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: In a long dream of life, and yet in a small dream of a game. from Minecraft, End Poem.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"Great!! You fulfiled your mission. It will revive peace in space. But, it may be invaded by the other Metroid. Pray for a true peace in space!"

— Metroid

(bad engrish, yes, but good game)

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
Echo 216 Pilot: "No.. Not them! Not again! We need to run!"

John-117: "No. We need to fight… Get ready."

Technically from a game because some sources from 343 confirm that this is one of the opening scenes for Halo Infinite. The feel I got when I first heard Masterchief say that was almost euphoric.

(Discover Hope trailer for Halo Infinite btw)

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
Mission Accomplished good work!
-COD 6 MW2 Ghost
RIP

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"Stick to chocolate and comic books. You're too young for love anyway." - Snooty Villager to Lazy Villager, Animal Crossing: New Leaf

"So the sun goes around the earth, and every four years it does it wrong? That's… not comforting." - Cranky Villager, Animal Crossing: Wild World

"While its face was rather frightening, I like to picture a cute little tail and perhaps some fluffy paws on its fins. Such speculation is not scientific, of course, and essentially amounts to paleontological fan fiction. I own that." - Blathers when asked to tell you about the Dunkleosteus fossil, Animal Crossing: New Horizons

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "The longer the Icon of Sin is on Earth, the stronger he will become."

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "I am a monument to all your sins" - Cortana Halo 3

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"If God had wanted you to live he would not have invented me!"

-The Soldier TF2

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"Do you feel like a hero yet?"

Spec Ops: The Line has such a haunting narrative that is companioned perfectly by equally dark and disturbing dialogue. Konrad's final speech, however, sticks with me more than anything else.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: Didn't notice anyone else mentioning it so here's the obligatory "Hey you. You're finally awake. You were trying to cross the border, right?" quote from Skyrim.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: Was looking for this comment

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
“it’s the most innovative shooter i’ve played in years!”
-superhot

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: Finally we got some hollow knight around here!

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "Better ingredients, Better Pasta, That's the power of Home Depot." - Random Ass poster in Spooky's Jumpscare Mansion

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
"Slowly, gently; This is how a life is taken."

Although basically any quote from Darkest Dungeon sends a tingle down my spine. Wayne June's voice is just astonishing.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded:
Hotline Miami had some conversations that really had you thinking I really can't pick out sole lines of dialouge there.

Funnily enough my all time favorite line was in borderlands 2s "SHOOT ME IN THE FACE" and the following "THANKS". I was laughing so hard I was literally crying.

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "Why is so much of our science dangerous? Why not marry safe science, if you love it so much. In fact, why not invent a special safety door that won't hit you on the butt on the way out. Because you are fired! (Not you, test subject, you're doing fine.) Yes, you, box your stuff! Out the front door! Parking lot! Car! GOODBAH!"

item.title: Re: Favorite video game quotes?
item.content:encoded: "Science is not about 'why?', it's about 'why not?'" -Cave Johnson, Portal 2
